businessBackground: PubMatic is an independent sell-side platform (SSP) providing cloud infrastructure for real-time programmatic advertising transactions. The company serves ~1,980 publishers across 64,000+ domains and 44,000+ apps. Revenue is generated as a percentage of the value of advertising impressions monetized on the platform (net revenue basis — PubMatic acts as agent, not principal).
catalysts: H2 2026: Google DOJ antitrust remedy phase
Ongoing: AgenticOS campaign count + revenue disclosure

flex.name: Data/Network Moat Depth
flex.rationale: 1,980 publishers, 64K domains, 44K apps, 55% SPO activity; breadth-based not depth-based moat; competitors (Magnite, Index Exchange) have comparable publisher reach

flex.name: AI Integration Maturity
flex.rationale: 17 operational AI agents, 250+ agentic campaigns, NVIDIA partnership, Ad Context Protocol co-founder, 40%+ code via AI; shipped but revenue de minimis

flex.name: Disruption Misperception
flex.rationale: Market prices PUBM as AI victim at 3.9x EV/EBITDA; own 10-K risk factors read as bear case while company has real AI infrastructure; wide narrative gap

universal.name: Mispricing Assessment
universal.rationale: ~55% prob-weighted upside; 3 independent legs (organic inflection, AgenticOS optionality, Google antitrust); floor ~ current price; no unaddressed structural causes but recurring headwind pattern is a concern

universal.name: Repricing Mechanism
universal.rationale: H2 2026 revenue inflection is dated (quarterly earnings) but depends on management delivering guided double-digit growth; mixed promise/delivery track record

universal.name: Business Quality
universal.rationale: #2 independent SSP (~4% share), 1,980 publishers, 63.6% gross margins, owned infrastructure; but NOT a monopoly — demand-side dependency on TTD/Google DV360; 54% A/R concentration from top 3 buyers

universal.name: Balance Sheet (GATE)
universal.rationale: $145.5M cash, zero debt, $110M undrawn revolver, $46.3M FCF, $81.1M OCF — fortress

rcChecklist.criterion: Latest annual filing (10-K/20-F) reviewed within 12 months
≥2 earnings transcripts reviewed (or waived if ticker has no transcripts available)

rcChecklist.evidence: no forward catalyst found — update catalyst-tracker or THESIS Catalyst Timeline
fair-value / scenario PW-FV present in THESIS.md

rcChecklist.criterion: debate-session run across all 6 pressure vectors

rcChecklist.evidence: market-vs-me-diagnostic section present but >90 days old or no date

rcChecklist.criterion: conviction-scoring + cross-model-validation council both complete; angels-advocate if band ≥ HIGH_CONVICTION
rcChecklist.evidence: run cross-model-validation + conviction-scoring (+ angels-advocate if HIGH_CONVICTION)
